## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Lead with the shape of the change, not a
     line-by-line walkthrough. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm test`, `pnpm build` pass locally
- [ ] `pnpm size` stays under budget (if the bundle changed)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this touches published code
- [ ] Updated `docs/ghost-contract.md` if this touches the Ghost integration surface
- [ ] No new runtime dependency in a published package (or justified below)

## Notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots. -->
